_comment: Tests booking-verb routing, YES handler guard, and that dry needling is only mentioned when explicitly asked — not volunteered.

scenarios.name: Booking intent during info session routes out silently

history.content: Can sports massage help with my shoulder pain?
Sports and remedial massage can definitely help with shoulder pain — it targets muscle tightness, reduces inflammation, and improves range of motion. Did you have any other questions?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_answered' with info_pivot_source='node_8' and implied_service set, producing zero spoken output. FAIL if agent says anything before the tool call.

scenarios.name: Dry needling not volunteered in general massage answer

history.content: What does Andy do in a massage session?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent describes sports/remedial massage techniques without mentioning dry needling. FAIL if agent mentions dry needling when the caller did not ask about it.

scenarios.name: Dry needling mentioned only when explicitly asked
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent answers 'Yes, Andy does offer dry needling — it's something he incorporates into his massage sessions' and appends closing line. FAIL if agent says Andy does not offer dry needling or if it fails to answer.
